title: PanelColor
text: PanelColor Determines the background color of panels. PanelColor = Color Arguments Color — Windows color name or Web color name. Default value If no color is defined, uses the Windows system color. File section [upi] Description The PanelColor setting corresponds to the setting Toolbar and Panel Color in the Toolbar tab of the Uniface Setup dialog box. By default, it is set to System Default . Note: This property is not applied to a pop-up panel, which is a panel that is displayed as a menu. [upi] panelcolor=lightsteelblue1 Copy Related Links Standard Colors Uniface supports standard color definitions including system colors as defined by the operating system, Web colors defined by the W3C, and RGB (red-green-blue) colors expressed in hex or decimal numbers. Any of these color definitions can be used when defining the value of foreground and background colors of components, widgets, panels, and toolbars. Panels Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
